# MMS Implementation Plan

**Last Updated**: 2026-01-22
**Status**: System ~95% complete, UI ~95% complete

## Executive Summary

MMS is **substantially complete**. The backend is production-ready (~95%) with all domain services, API endpoints, workers, and optimizer. The UI is ~95% complete with the Infinite Canvas, all zoom layers, overlays, modals, Explanation Panel, Notification System, and all P1/P2 polish items implemented. Remaining work is P3 operations tooling.

---

## Implementation Status Overview

| Phase | Component | Status | Completeness |
|-------|-----------|--------|--------------|
| 1 | Database Schema | ✅ COMPLETE | 100% |
| 2 | Core Domain Services | ✅ COMPLETE | 100% |
| 3 | Run Assignment Optimizer | ✅ COMPLETE | 100% |
| 4 | Strategic Planner | ✅ COMPLETE | 100% |
| 5 | API Layer | ✅ COMPLETE | 100% |
| 6 | Integration (Maximo) | ✅ COMPLETE | 100% |
| 7 | UI (Infinite Canvas) | ✅ COMPLETE | **95%** |
| 8 | Operations (Docker/K8s) | ✅ COMPLETE | 95% |

---

## Phase 7: UI Implementation (Complete)

### 7.1 Completed Components ✅

#### Foundation Layer ✅
- [x] Project structure with Vite + React 18 + TypeScript
- [x] @belt/tools state machines (NO React hooks)
- [x] deck.gl + BlueprintJS v6 + Konva integration
- [x] Vite proxy to backend API

#### State Machine Infrastructure ✅
- [x] `src/store/slices/canvas.ts` - Zoom, pan, selection state
- [x] `src/store/slices/ui.ts` - Theme, toasts, modals, loading
- [x] `src/store/slices/pm.ts` - PM CRUD, drag state
- [x] `src/store/slices/fleet.ts` - Fleet/train data
- [x] `src/store/slices/scenario.ts` - Scenario management
- [x] `src/store/slices/overlay.ts` - Overlay visibility

#### Infinite Canvas Core ✅
- [x] `src/components/canvas/InfiniteCanvas.tsx` - Hybrid deck.gl/Konva
- [x] Semantic zoom with 5 levels (Strategic → Detail)
- [x] Mouse/touch pan and zoom
- [x] Keyboard shortcuts and accessibility

#### Canvas Layers ✅
- [x] `src/components/canvas/layers/StrategicHeatmapLayer.tsx` - deck.gl WebGL
- [x] `src/components/canvas/layers/TacticalGanttLayer.tsx` - Konva 2D
- [x] `src/components/canvas/layers/TacticalWideLayer.tsx` - Compressed view
- [x] `src/components/canvas/layers/OperationalDetailLayer.tsx` - Detail cards
- [x] `src/components/canvas/layers/DetailCardOverlay.tsx` - React DOM overlay

#### PM Visualization ✅
- [x] PM block rendering with color coding (C1/C2/C3/C4/OH)
- [x] Status indicators (scheduled, in-progress, completed, locked)
- [x] Drag-and-drop rescheduling with validation
- [x] `src/components/canvas/DragConfirmationDialog.tsx` - Constraint feedback

#### Overlay Panels ✅
- [x] `src/components/overlay/ManHourOverlayPanel.tsx` - Utilization
- [x] `src/components/overlay/DriftOverlayPanel.tsx` - Baseline comparison
- [x] `src/components/overlay/ScenarioComparisonView.tsx` - Side-by-side

#### Modals ✅
- [x] `src/components/modals/ModalContainer.tsx` - Dispatcher
- [x] `src/components/modals/RunOptimizerModal.tsx`
- [x] `src/components/modals/CreateScenarioModal.tsx`
- [x] `src/components/modals/PublishBaselineModal.tsx`
- [x] `src/components/modals/ImportModal.tsx`

#### Layout ✅
- [x] `src/components/layout/Header.tsx` - Logo, filters, search, user
- [x] `src/components/layout/Toolbar.tsx` - Actions, zoom, date nav
- [x] `src/components/layout/Sidebar.tsx` - Train list with filters
- [x] `src/components/layout/StatusBar.tsx` - Status info
- [x] `src/components/canvas/Minimap.tsx` - Timeline navigation

#### Accessibility ✅
- [x] Keyboard handler with shortcuts
- [x] Focus management
- [x] A11y announcer for screen readers
- [x] WCAG 2.1 AA compliance utilities

### 7.2 Remaining Gaps (P1)

#### Explanation Panel ✅ (COMPLETED 2026-01-21)
- [x] **Run Assignment Explanation**
  - `src/components/explanation/RunAssignmentExplanation.tsx`
  - Show scoring breakdown for optimizer decisions
  - Display alternatives considered
  - Link to constraints that influenced decision

- [x] **PM Scheduling Explanation**
  - `src/components/explanation/PMScheduleExplanation.tsx`
  - Show mileage trigger calculation
  - Display compliance window boundaries
  - Resource availability timeline

#### Notification System ✅ (COMPLETED 2026-01-21)
- [x] **Toast Notifications**
  - `src/components/notifications/ToastManager.tsx`
  - Centralized toast management via Redux (ui.toasts)
  - Success/warning/error/info types with appropriate durations
  - Auto-dismiss with module-level timer tracker
  - Accessibility: ARIA live regions, reduced motion support

- [x] **Alert Banner**
  - `src/components/notifications/AlertBanner.tsx`
  - System-wide messages (connection, sync, drift, error, maintenance)
  - Priority-based display (shows most critical alert)
  - Integrated with Redux state (connection, sync, error states)

### 7.3 Polish Items (P2) ✅

- [x] Baseline shadow layer visualization refinement (COMPLETED 2026-01-21)
- [x] Scenario comparison statistics panel (COMPLETED 2026-01-22)
- [x] Enhanced PM detail panel with full change history (COMPLETED 2026-01-22)
- [x] Bulk selection and operations (COMPLETED 2026-01-22)

---

## Phase 8: Operations Gaps (P2)

### Completed ✅
- [x] docker-compose.yml
- [x] All Dockerfiles (backend, worker, frontend, optimizer)
- [x] k8s/ manifests (namespace, deployments, services, ingress, HPA)

### Remaining
- [ ] **Grafana Dashboards** - JSON definitions
- [ ] **Prometheus Alerts** - Alert rules YAML
- [ ] **CI/CD Pipeline** - GitHub Actions workflow

---

## Minor Code Issues (P3)

### TODOs in Source Code

| File | Line | Issue | Priority |
|------|------|-------|----------|
| `src/api/routes/manhour.ts` | 127 | `pendingAdjustments: 0` - Count adjustments when relation loaded | LOW |
| `src/api/routes/pm-schedule.ts` | 154 | `fleetCode: pm.train.fleetId` - Get fleet code from relation | LOW |
| `src/services/man-hour-leveling.ts` | 843 | `corrective: 0` - Integrate with unavailability events | MEDIUM |
| `src/services/man-hour-leveling.ts` | 844 | `overhaul: 0` - Separate overhaul tracking | MEDIUM |

---

## Validation Commands

```bash
bun test           # Unit tests (173 pass in UI)
bun run typecheck  # TypeScript strict ✅
bun run lint       # ESLint ✅
bun run build      # Full build ✅
```

---

## Recommended Next Steps

1. **Grafana/Prometheus** - Production observability dashboards and alerts
2. **CI/CD Pipeline** - GitHub Actions automated deployment workflow

---

## Completed Components Reference

### Backend Services ✅
All 18 domain services fully implemented with tests (~15,000 LOC):
- ingestion, fleet, pm-scheduler, strategic-planner
- baseline, drift-monitor, material, costing
- man-hour-leveling, maximo-sync, notification
- simulation, export, service-demand, unavailability
- route-utilization, baseline-assumption, auth

### Optimizer ✅
- C++ binary with OR-Tools CP-SAT
- TypeScript fallback
- Full test coverage

### API Layer ✅
- 105+ REST endpoints
- WebSocket hub
- OpenAPI spec (1,529 lines)
- JWT auth + RBAC
- Rate limiting

### Workers ✅
All 9 BullMQ workers implemented

---

## Notes

- Spec 009 (Demo Application) does not exist in `specs/` directory
- Backend is production-ready
- UI verification passed via Playwright MCP (2026-01-21)
- All services emit OpenTelemetry traces
